profile.name: Rod Allen
profile.targetRole: Enterprise Solutions Architect, Revenue Operations Leader, Head of Marketing Operations

sections.summary:
Strategic Revenue Operations leader with over 17 years of dedicated experience architecting and scaling global Go-To-Market (GTM) operations for enterprise organizations and high-growth technology companies. Recognized expert in translating complex business challenges into streamlined revenue systems, fostering executive visibility, and driving operational efficiency. Proven track record of leading cross-functional initiatives spanning Sales, Marketing, and Executive Leadership to align teams through scalable processes and advanced CRM architecture. Hands-on technical expert in enterprise GTM technology ecosystems, including deep proficiency in Salesforce, Adobe Marketo Engage, and Workato integrations.

Boise, Idaho, United States | famallen8@gmail.com | LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/in/rod-a-0aa5596
sections.experience:
**MERGE** | Solutions Architect Jeto | Boise, ID | February 2023 - Present
- Direct enterprise Revenue Operations and Go-To-Market (GTM) transformation initiatives, optimizing system architecture for Fortune 500 and high-growth technology clients.
- Architect and deliver highly scalable, enterprise-grade marketing automation solutions designed to support complex, global organizational structures.
- Engineer unified GTM ecosystems by utilizing Workato to seamlessly integrate Salesforce, Marketo, Adobe Workfront, Asana, AddEvent, and other critical business systems.

**Neo4j** | Head of Global Marketing Operations and Automation | Boise, Idaho | April 2018 - February 2023
- Scaled global operations coverage from a strict North American focus to four distinct global regions by architecting a fully automated program submission and execution system.
- Drove massive database scaling, successfully managing the customer database growth from 400,000 to 1.5 million records while strictly maintaining data quality and integrity.
- Designed and deployed cross-object, multi-level Salesforce (SFDC) reporting structures backed by extensive executive dashboards.
- Enabled org-wide, self-serve access to analytics, facilitating up-to-the-minute, data-driven decision-making across the company.

**MariaDB Corporation** | Head of Global Sales & Marketing Operations | Boise, Idaho Area | March 2011 - April 2018
- Spearheaded foundational organizational alignment between sales and marketing by developing and launching the company's inaugural revenue model and dynamic analytics practice.
- Directed the end-to-end implementation, deployment, and management of new Salesforce (SFDC) and Marketo environments.
- Developed and launched custom sales process automation, establishing comprehensive lead routing protocols, dynamic lead scoring, and full-funnel revenue lifecycle programs.

**MySQL / Sun Microsystems / Oracle Corporation** | WW Sales Development Manager - MySQL Sales | Boise, Idaho | October 2007 - March 2011
- Led the global Sales Development Representative (SDR) team across North America, Brazil, and Ireland, successfully maintaining continuous operations and performance through major corporate acquisitions by Sun Microsystems and Oracle.
- Served on the elite SFDC tiger team tasked with executing a complete systemic overhaul of the Lead and Contact processes within Salesforce CRM.
- Facilitated critical change management initiatives, guiding the enterprise transition and data migration from Salesforce.com to Oracle CRM.

**Micron Technology** | Inside Sales Account Manager | Boise, Idaho | February 2001 - October 2007
- Directed the dedicated memory supply chain for Cisco Systems, ensuring staging and product availability on a continuous rolling three-month basis.
- Served as a key beta-tester for all new SAP modules and procedural updates related to Global Finished Goods.
- Oversaw highly regulated international shipments, strictly enforcing compliance with complex, country-specific import and customs requirements.
sections.skills:
**Domain Expertise:** Revenue Operations, Business Process Engineering, Sales Process Optimization, Global GTM Strategy, Marketing Automation, Data Governance.

**Technology Ecosystems:** Salesforce (SFDC), Oracle CRM, Adobe Marketo Engage, Workato, Adobe Workfront, Asana, AddEvent, SAP.

**Certifications:** Marketo Certified Expert, Automation Pro III, Automation Pro II.
